title: phanera kockiana var. kockiana
intro: Phanera kockiana var. kockiana, a rare and lesser-known species of plants in the family Dipterocarpaceae, is a type of tropical tree native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phanera kockiana var. kockiana are believed to include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
